description: Tests the system should pass with the new tool-calling architecture. Uses realistic but not garbled speech.

cases.description: Single item, no modifiers required
inputs: I want two cheese slices please

cases.description: Pizza requires size and crust — AI should collect both before adding
inputs: I want a large pepperoni pizza

cases.description: Two different items in one turn
inputs: I want a large cheese pizza hand tossed and a caesar salad

cases.description: Wings with count, style, and sauce — 4 required modifier groups
inputs: I want twelve boneless wings with medium buffalo sauce

cases.description: Customer says 'pie' — should find Pizza items
inputs: I want a large pepperoni pie please

cases.description: Customer says 'sub' or 'hero' — should find Hero items
inputs: give me a chicken parm sub

cases.description: Customer changes their mind on size
inputs: I want a small cheese pizza hand tossed

cases.description: Customer removes an item
inputs: I want a calzone and garlic knots

cases.description: Quantity specified, same item
Ambiguous 'margherita' — AI must clarify before adding
inputs: I want a margherita large hand tossed
cases.expected_behavior: AI asks: Margherita Pizza or Margherita Sicilian?

expected_cart.note: Cart stays empty until customer disambiguates

cases.description: Cheesecake disambiguation
inputs: I want a slice of cheesecake
cases.expected_behavior: AI asks: New York Cheesecake or Italian Cheesecake?

expected_cart.note: Cart stays empty until customer picks which one

cases.description: Hot coffee should match Hot Coffee ($2.49) not Hot Coffee Box-equivalent
Catering item requires advance notice — AI must warn before adding
inputs: I want a party pizza tray
cases.expected_behavior: AI informs customer that catering items require 24-48 hour advance notice

expected_cart.note: Cart stays empty because catering requires advance notice

cases.description: Delivery order — AI must capture address
cases.expected_behavior: AI asks for delivery address before or after taking order

cases.description: Customer asks price — AI answers without adding to cart
inputs: how much is a large pepperoni pizza?
cases.expected_behavior: AI states the price and asks if customer wants to order it

expected_cart.note: No item added — customer only asked price

cases.description: Customer asks about 'vegetables' — AI lists available vegetable toppings for a pizza
inputs: I want a large cheese pizza hand tossed with some vegetables
cases.expected_behavior: AI lists the vegetable topping options from the pizza's modifier group

expected_cart.note: Cart stays empty until customer specifies which vegetables

cases.description: Half-and-half pizza topping
inputs: I want a large cheese pizza hand tossed, put pepperoni on the left half

cases.description: Five-item order — all items should be in cart
inputs: I want a large pepperoni pizza thin crust, twelve bone-in wings with hot buffalo and bleu cheese, a caesar salad, mozzarella sticks, and two fountain sodas

expected_cart.note: 2 Fountain Sodas should be quantity 2 on one cart item, or two separate items — both acceptable

cases.description: Customer adds item after confirming done
Customer asks about gluten free
inputs: do you have gluten free options?
cases.expected_behavior: AI confirms gluten free crust is available (+$4.00) and gluten free pasta/rolls are available
